untranslatable_reason: Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom requires detection of dynamic trend lines (lead-in phase, down-sloping top trend line, throwback to trend line, lead-in height measurement). The available indicators lack linear regression, trend line fitting, or multi-phase pattern sequencing capabilities. Narrow range and drop-off phases can be approximated with Bollinger Bands and price action, but the core pattern structure (trend line slope, throwback confirmation, phase-dependent conditions) cannot be reliably expressed with static indicator thresholds.
